name: Chicken Cranberry Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 13x9 inch (3 quart) baking dish.
3. Place the chicken breast halves in the greased dish.
4. Bake at 400°F for 25 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, in a medium skillet over medium heat, cook and stir onion in hot oil until tender.
6. Add catsup, brown sugar, and orange peel; blend until the brown sugar is dissolved.
7. Stir in cranberries.
8. Spoon the mixture over the partially baked chicken breasts.
9. Bake an additional 20 minutes or until the chicken is tender.
